Research System Types

Type definitions for R&D system per economy.md:4.0

Core research concepts:

  • RP (Research Points): Investment in R&D
  • ERP (Economic Research Points): For Economic Level
  • SRP (Science Research Points): For Science Level
  • TRP (Technology Research Points): For specific technologies
  • Breakthroughs: Random research events (bi-annual)
Constants per economy.md:4.0Helper Procs

Imports

../../common/types/core, ../../common/types/tech, ../prestige

Types

BreakthroughEvent = object
  houseId*: HouseId
  turn*: int
  breakthroughType*: BreakthroughType
  category*: ResearchCategory
  amount*: int
  costReduction*: float
  autoAdvance*: bool
  revolutionary*: Option[RevolutionaryTech]
Research breakthrough result 
BreakthroughType {.pure.} = enum
  Minor, Moderate, Major, Revolutionary
ResearchAllocation = object
  economic*: int
  science*: int
  technology*: Table[TechField, int]
PP allocated to research this turn 
ResearchCategory {.pure.} = enum
  Economic, Science, Technology
ResearchPoints = object
  economic*: int
  science*: int
  technology*: Table[TechField, int]
Accumulated research points 
ResearchReport = object
  turn*: int
  allocations*: Table[HouseId, ResearchAllocation]
  breakthroughs*: seq[BreakthroughEvent]
  advancements*: seq[TechAdvancement]
Research phase report 
RevolutionaryTech {.pure.} = enum
  QuantumComputing, AdvancedStealth, TerraformingNexus, ExperimentalPropulsion
TechAdvancement = object
  houseId*: HouseId
  field*: TechField
  fromLevel*: int
  toLevel*: int
  cost*: int
  prestigeEvent*: Option[PrestigeEvent]
Tech level advancement event 
TechTree = object
  levels*: TechLevel
  accumulated*: ResearchPoints
  breakthroughBonus*: Table[TechField, float]
House technology tree

Consts

BASE_BREAKTHROUGH_CHANCE = 0.1
BREAKTHROUGH_BONUS_PER_50RP = 0.01
EL_BASE_COST = 50
EL_COST_INCREMENT = 10
EL_COST_INCREMENT_HIGH = 15
EL_MAX_MODIFIER = 0.5
EL_MODIFIER_PER_LEVEL = 0.05
RESEARCH_UPGRADE_TURNS = [1, 7]

Procs

proc initResearchAllocation(): ResearchAllocation {....raises: [], tags: [],
    forbids: [].}
Initialize empty research allocation 
proc initTechTree(startingLevels: TechLevel): TechTree {....raises: [], tags: [],
    forbids: [].}
Initialize tech tree with starting levels

Exports

HouseId, TechField, TechLevel, PrestigeEvent
